text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The judges have ruled that first-place finisher Mejiro McQueen 
illegally obstructed other horsegirl during the race.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Her placement will be adjusted to eighteenth.

The race unfolded with a great start for Mejiro McQueen. She 
navigated to the inner track in an attempt to find a good position.

Unfortunately, this hampered the movement of the runners behind 
her, resulting in a situation where many were in danger of falling.

As this was caused by the race's favorite to win, the public reaction 
was significant.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen, are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't deny that my actions posed a risk to other competitors, 
betraying the high expectations placed upon me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I simply need to move on and improve myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'll put this failure of a race behind me by succeeding in the next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just don't be so hard on yourself, okay? We can plainly see that 
you've reflected well enough on this.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl with Straight-cut Bangs
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'll be looking forward to your next race!

text_block_list.name: Droopy-eyed Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Fight on, McQueen!
choice_data_list: Let's treat this as a learning experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, I plan to do so.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yo, anyone miss me?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There were a bunch of creeps with cameras out there so I screamed, 
"Look, a buncha creeps!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Those were no doubt reporters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine that they were just waiting for a chance to catch 
me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, don't sweat it. They weren't supposed to be in the academy 
anyway, so they really were creeps.

The last of them should be gone soon enough. Let's hold off on any 
actual training today, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's not as if I am particularly bothered by the idea of answering their 
questions. I would do so with full honesty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And at some point, I will need to speak with them about my plans to 
win my next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm in the mood to move my body. Let's go, Trainer!
…All right.
…All right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The dorm is just over there. I don't think you need to accompany me 
any longer.

I don't want you to get caught up alone with a bunch of rabid 
reporters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Like I said, I do not mind answering their questions.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, McQueen! May I get your comments in regards to the autumn 
Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Why did you choose to run in such a dangerous manner?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for causing such dire inconvenience toward all of those 
involved with the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This incident was the result of my own foolish inexperience. I can 
make no excuses.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Have you spoken to the runners who were caught up behind you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I paid each of them a visit to apologize personally.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Was it your trainer who instructed you to force your way to the inside?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Instructions from my trainer? We discussed nothing of the sort!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That was entirely the result of my own judgment. My trainer has 
nothing to do with this incident!

Despite keeping her cool thus far, McQueen grows indignant when 
faced with this question.

I know she wants to answer their questions with honesty, and I 
intended to let her do so if it would help her sort out her own 
emotions.

However, the sight of her trying to shoulder all of the responsibility 
on her own is too much for me to bear.

However, the sight of her trying to shoulder all of the responsibility 
on her own is too much for me to bear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But if I leave now, they'll assume that this was your fault somehow!

Regardless of whose judgment call it was, as her trainer, I take full 
responsibility for what happened. My deepest apologies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer!
Come on, let's get going.

Don't let it bother you, McQueen. You were simply running your heart 
out. There is nothing to blame on you.

Don't let it bother you, McQueen. You were simply running your heart 
out. There is nothing to blame on you.

You said you were going to put this behind you, right? Let's put all of 
our energy towards the next race.

You said you were going to put this behind you, right? Let's put all of 
our energy towards the next race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: …Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But um… Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've decided that I want to run in the Japan Cup before the Arima 
Kinen.

That's so soon, though. Surely you're still tired from the race you just 
ran…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No, I'm perfectly fine. I'm ready to give it my full power.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please allow me to enter the Japan Cup.

I imagine that she hopes to put this incident away as quickly as 
possible.

Not only that, but she likely means it as a way to redeem herself in 
the eyes of fans and those she troubled.
choice_data_list: All right. Our next race will be the Japan Cup.
All right. Our next race will be the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I am absolutely… absolutely going to win.
Wooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: McQueen is struggling to keep up. The gap is widening!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text: Today's favorite, Mejiro McQueen, places fourth!
